target: 3. The Brake Isn't Working!?
(...This is the second time. Time has gone back again.)
(Did I... die...? If so, why did I come back...)
(That was an unexpected reunion...)
(...But what was that sense of deja vu I felt before talking to Koyuba-san?)
(Something was weird with that person earlier too... Maybe I really am just tired.)
—Thank you for sailing with us.
...It hasn't changed. Not at all, since two years ago...
Heeeey!!
Welcome back, Shin-chan!! Good job on the long trip~~~~~!!
(It's happening again... this scene again!)
(Take a bird's-eye view, take a bird's-eye view!! I heard her voice... Ushio's voice...!!)
(She asked me to do it. To protect... Mio!!)
...H-Huh? The brakes... Aaaaaaah!?
(I'm pretty sure Mio's brakes were tampered with...!)
(I-I have to stop Mio quickly—)
(Crap, I was too slow! I won't make it...!!)
Waaaaaaaah!!
(Damn it... what am I doing!! If I had just moved a little faster...!)
Miooooo!! Are you okay!?
...Blub blub blub blub...
—Puha!
A-Ahahaha...! Sorry Shin-chan, I surprised you...!
Are you okay!? Are you hurt!?
Eh? Ah, I'm totally fine! I just fell into the ocean.
Besides, look! I was sweating a bit... so I thought I'd take a dip!!
Hahaha... I'm glad you're doing well...
(Almost the exact same lines as before... So I really am looping.)
Here, come on up. I'll lend you a hand.
...Thanks.
...Was the ocean salty?
Heh? A-Ah, yeah... ...Why are you asking that?
No... it's nothing.
Mio!!
Shin-chan!! Look ou—
Leave it... to me!!
Shin-chan!!
(Ugh... I-I managed to protect Mio, but...)
(I... can't swim...)
(This place is pretty deep, isn't it? If this keeps up, I'm in trouble...)
(This is... bad... My consciousness... is...)
Shin-chan!!
Shin-chan! Shin-chan, pull yourself together!
M-Mio... Are you hurt...?
...Yeah. Thank you, Shin-chan!
But in the end, I was the one who got saved by you. How pathetic...
That's not true! You put your body on the line to save me!
Anyway, I'm sorry! For some reason the brakes wouldn't work...
Well, as long as you're not hurt, that's what matters.
Ah, are you hurt anywhere, Shin-chan?
I'm fine. But I got completely soaked.
It's summer, so I think you'll dry off if you walk, but... Let's go to my place for now.
Yeah.
(You're kidding... Is this... what they call <color=#GF_TIPS_058>deja vu</color>—)
<color=#GF_TIPS_008>Mio</color>!
(I'm relieved she looks more energetic than I thought... wait, no!)
H-Hey! You're going too fast!! Brake!!
...H-Huh? The brakes... Aaaaaaah!?
Wha- Mio!?
H-Hey, are you okay?
...Blub blub blub blub...
—Puha!
A-Ahahaha...! Sorry Shin-chan, I surprised you...!
Haa... what are you doing?
I was sweating a bit... so I thought I'd take a dip!!
I'm glad you're doing well...
(Mio, when she jumped in just now... Even the pattern on her panties was the same.)
Mio, what happened to the brakes? Did they not work?
Yeah...! Even though I properly applied them~! That's weird~~~...
(What does this mean, did something break...?)
(There are marks on the <color=#GF_TIPS_089>brake</color> wire that look like cuts...!?)
(With this, if you grip the brakes hard, it's only natural they'd snap.)
(It's a good thing she just fell into the ocean, but if things went wrong, it could have been a major accident involving her life!)
(This can't be written off as a prank. Who on earth would do such a thing—)
Shin-chaaan? You could at least lend me a hand!
A-Ah! Sorry...
Here, come on up.
...Thanks.
...It's salty, the <color=#GF_KEY_MIO_DROPSEA>ocean</color>.
